title: taraxacum interruptum
intro: Taraxacum interruptum, also known as the interrupted dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is characterized by its jagged or interrupted leaves, which give it its name. The plant is believed to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can be used to treat various health issues. Taraxacum interruptum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or powder, and has been traditionally used to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system.
